programs.title: Capturing Home
programs.desc: Megan and Michelle desperately need help redesigning their outdoor space, so Kate and Amy bring in some midcentury modern design elements to create a beautiful area for entertaining all year round.

programs.title: Capturing Home
programs.desc: A newly single dad of two girls is ready to transform his house from a bachelor pad devoid of any cohesive design into a true family home that reflects not only his tastes, but also his children's.

programs.title: Capturing Home
programs.desc: A newly divorced grandma moves across the country to be closer to her daughter and grandchild; this is her first house of her very own, and she needs Amy and Kate to help her design a French-inspired home to set the stage for her next chapter.

programs.title: Building Off the Grid
programs.desc: A family builds thousands of earth blocks while withstanding winter monsoons, freezing temperatures and more to finish their forever home in San Antonio, Texas.

programs.title: Building Off the Grid
programs.desc: A couple head to Arkansas with their kids to build a dream mountain getaway; while the views of this location are breathtaking, this build is anything but a breeze; the family has to work together through severe weather to get this job done.

programs.title: Building Off the Grid
programs.desc: A family of four builds their dream home overlooking the Atlantic Ocean in Lubec, ME, while pro snowboarder Sean Busby and his wife build their off-grid home with stunning views of Glacier National Park.
